figures.title: Large-Scale Portfolio Optimization Problem Under Cardinality Constraint With Enhanced Multi-Objective Evolutionary Algorithms

The second row contains corresponding numerical values: 0.20, 0.15, 0.25, 0.10, and 0.30, representing allocation weights or proportions for each asset position in a portfolio.
